articles.author: Nicole  Sganga
articles.title: DHS orders thousands of furloughed employees back to work despite ongoing shutdown - CBS News
articles.description: The Department of Homeland Security has ordered thousands of furloughed employees back to work, even as the agency technically remains shut down and unfunded by Congress.
articles.content: Washington — The Department of Homeland Security has ordered thousands of furloughed employees back to work, according to internal emails obtained by CBS News, even as most of the agency technically … [+5605 chars]
